narrative:
Wayne Township has 3,254 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points.
